abnormal.instruction:
Give 100 prompts that describe a photo of a defective object or texture in industrial manufacturing. Do not mention specific object name. Be diverse in adjectives and sentence structure. 
Give your outputs in JSON format as a list.
prompts: A texture with visible dirt on it.
A flat texture contaminated by small foreign particles.
